description.div: Jinmen County is an administrative region of the Republic of China (R.O.C.). Geographically, Jinmen and Xiamen form an archipelago. While Jinmen is administered by the Republic of China, Xiamen is adminstered by the People\'s Republic of China. After 1949, the People\'s Liberation Army of the People\'s Republic of China attempted to conquer Jinmen. Until now, Jinmen remains heavily militarized.

Jinmen County is an administrative region of the Republic of China (R.O.C.). Geographically, Jinmen and Xiamen form an archipelago. While Jinmen is administered by the Republic of China, Xiamen is adminstered by the People\'s Republic of China. After 1949, the People\'s Liberation Army of the People\'s Republic of China attempted to conquer Jinmen. Until now, Jinmen remains heavily militarized.
